name: Inauthentic Hummus
short_description: in 'Inauthentic Hummus' you play as a refugee running a food truck, serving "almost" authentic ethnic dishes. Upgrade your tools, ingredients, and truck to serve customers quickly. Earn your citizenship and buy passports for your family within 30 days.
detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of a resourceful refugee in "Inauthentic Hummus," an engaging time-management game that blends strategy with heartwarming storytelling. You run a bustling food truck, serving up "almost" authentic ethnic foods to a diverse and growing customer base.

Your mission is clear: upgrade your tools, ingredients, and food truck to serve your customers swiftly and efficiently. Each dish you prepare brings you closer to your ultimate goal—earning your citizenship and securing passports for your family within a 30-day window.

.

Features
  • Face the daily challenges of running a mobile kitchen
  • Fast-Paced gameplay with a focus on pleasing customers
  • Invest in better equipment, ingredients, and pay your truck debt
  • Pass your Civics exam and qualify for an apartment
  • Discover the story of your escape from Iraqiland and save your family from the war
